columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: dem_tumor_type
columns.label: Tumor type
columns.description: Indicates tumor type.

columns.name: dem_name
columns.label: Name and Surnames
columns.description: Name and surnames of the patient.

columns.name: dem_birthdate
columns.label: Date of birth
columns.description: Birth date of the patient.

columns.name: dem_gender
columns.label: Gender
columns.description: Gender of the patient.

columns.name: dem_date_first_visit
columns.label: Date first visit
columns.description: Date of first visit at Medical Oncology department.

columns.name: dem_date_first_visit_sarcoma
columns.label: Date of first visit (Sarcoma unit)
columns.description: Date of first visit at Sarcoma Unit.

columns.name: dem_first_visit_type
columns.label: Type of fisrt visit
columns.description: Select how the patient’s first visit was conducted: In person or  Remote / Online.

columns.name: dem_primary_point_entry
columns.label: Primary point of entry
columns.description: Primary point of entry refers to the main source or pathway through which the patient first accessed the service or was referred into the program or study. It identifies who or what initiated the patient’s entry (e.g., primary care physician, tumor board, another hospital, or the patient themselves).

columns.name: dem_age_at_first_visit
columns.label: Age at first visit
columns.description: Age at first visit.

columns.name: dem_aya
columns.label: AYA?
columns.description: This variable typically indicates whether the patient belongs to the AYA population, distinguishing them from pediatric (<15) or older adult (>39) groups for tailored study analysis or care pathways.

columns.name: dem_physician
columns.label: Physiscian
columns.description: Physician's name.

columns.name: dem_ethnicity
columns.label: Ethnicity
columns.description: Ethnicity refers to a patient's self-identified cultural or ancestral group, based on shared attributes like language, traditions, ancestry, religion, or national origin.

columns.name: dem_menopausal_stat
columns.label: Menopausal status
columns.description: Menopausal status classifies a female patient's reproductive stage based on menstrual history, hormone levels (e.g., FSH), or clinical criteria.

columns.name: dem_cancer_during_pregnancy
columns.label: Cancer diagnosed during pregnancy?
columns.description: Identify cases where malignancy was detected while the patient was pregnant.

columns.name: dem_cancer_during_breastfeed
columns.label: Cancer diagnosed during breastfeeding?
columns.description: Identify cases where malignancy was detected while the patient was giving breastfeeding.

columns.name: dem_tpal
columns.label: TPAL
columns.description: An obstetric scoring system summarizing a woman's pregnancy history.

columns.name: dem_abortion_12m
columns.label: Abortion 12 months prior to diagnosis of breast cancer?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient had an abortion (spontaneous or induced) within the 12 months prior to the date of breast cancer diagnosis.

columns.name: dem_breastfeed
columns.label: Has the patient been breastfeeding?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has engaged in breastfeeding (lactation and feeding breast milk to an infant) at any relevant time, typically in the context of reproductive or cancer history.

columns.name: dem_breastfeed_last_duration
columns.label: Breastfeeding months (last child)
columns.description: Duration of breastfeeding last child (months).

columns.name: dem_origin
columns.label: Hospital Origin
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient belongs to Vall d'Hebron or to another hospital.

columns.name: dem_hospital_origin
columns.label: Hospital Reference
columns.description: Identifies the specific hospital or medical center where the patient was first admitted, diagnosed, or treated for the condition (e.g., breast cancer), used for tracking referral sources in clinical studies.

columns.name: dem_province
columns.label: Hospital Province
columns.description: Specifies the administrative province of residence, diagnosis, or treatment for the patient, based on Spain's 50 provinces for geographic stratification in clinical studies.

columns.name: dem_uitm_comunidad_autonoma
columns.label: Hospital Autonomic Comunity
columns.description: Identifies the autonomous community of patient residence, diagnosis, or treatment, one of Spain's 17 autonomous communities plus 2 autonomous cities.

columns.name: dem_consorcium
columns.label: SNS consorcium
columns.description: Classifies the hospital or healthcare center (origin or reference) as public (government-funded) or private.

columns.name: dem_area_reference
columns.label: Area of reference
columns.description: Classifies the geographic scope or referral area of the patient's hospital/treatment center using a hierarchical system, with Vall d'Hebron as the primary local reference and expanding to international levels.

columns.name: dem_country
columns.label: Country
columns.description: Specifies the European country of origin or residence for patients from EU/non-Spanish Europe, used in conjunction with "Area of reference: eu" for international patient stratification.

columns.name: dem_country_other
columns.label: Other Country (outside Europe)
columns.description: Records the specific non-European country of patient origin or residence when Area of reference = "outside_eu".

columns.name: dem_reference
columns.label: Reference type
columns.description: Classifies the reason or pathway for patient referral to the reference hospital (Vall d'Hebron), distinguishing new cases from referrals or second opinions in oncology care networks.

columns.name: dem_referrall_network
columns.label: Referrall network
columns.description: Identifies the institutional network or sector from which the patient was referred when Reference type = "referall", focusing on Catalonia's healthcare system.

columns.name: dem_intention_visit
columns.label: Intention first visit
columns.description: Classifies the primary purpose of the patient's initial consultation at the reference center (Vall d'Hebron), distinguishing standard treatment from research protocols or consultative services in oncology care pathways.

columns.name: dem_therapeutical_action
columns.label: Therpeuctical attitude first visit
columns.description: Documents the clinical decision or therapeutic approach decided during the patient's initial consultation at the reference center, capturing treatment initiation, observation strategy, or palliative focus in oncology care pathways.

columns.name: dem_pt_type
columns.label: Type of patient
columns.description: Classifies patients by treatment center and disease stage at first visit to Vall d'Hebron oncology, distinguishing local (VH) vs. referral (REF) patients and early-stage vs. metastatic disease.

columns.name: dem_trial_stat
columns.label: Patient enrolled into  a clinical trial?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has formally enrolled in a clinical trial after first visit.

columns.name: dem_trial_name
columns.label: Clinical Trial Name
columns.description: Records the specific name, acronym, or protocol identifier of the clinical trial.

columns.name: dem_trial_phase
columns.label: Clinical Trial Phase
columns.description: Specifies the development phase of the clinical trial.

columns.name: dem_tto_prev_lines
columns.label: Previous treatment lines
columns.description: Records the total number of distinct prior systemic anticancer treatment regimens (chemotherapy, targeted therapy, immunotherapy) received before the first visit at Vall d'Hebron.

columns.name: dem_other_tumors
columns.label: Previous cancer
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has a documented history of any malignant neoplasm (other than the current cancer diagnosis) prior to the first visit at Vall d'Hebron, including successfully treated basal/squamous cell carcinomas if clinically relevant.

columns.name: dem_family_history
columns.label: Family history of cancer
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has first-degree relatives (parents, siblings, children) or second-degree relatives (grandparents, aunts/uncles, nieces/nephews) with a history of cancer relevant to cancer risk assessment.

columns.name: dem_family_history_details
columns.label: Family history of cancer details
columns.description: Provides detailed documentation of family cancer history when "Family history of cancer = Yes", including relative's relationship, cancer type(s).
